title: elaeocarpus obovatus
intro: Elaeocarpus obovatus, also known as the blue cherry or blue olive, is a small, evergreen tree or shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus obovatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, with traditional methods often involving the use of the leaves and bark to create remedies for various ailments.
